note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right heel wound site, rates 9/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Stage 4 pressure ulcer Right heel measures 9.1 cm x 5.2 cm x 3.3 cm.
  Wound bed: 70% slough, 30% granulation tissue. Periwound: erythematous.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: none.
Assessment: Stage 4 pressure ulcer Right heel — improving.
Plan: Physician notified of wound progression. Offloading boot applied.

*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Pressure Ulcer to Right heel / Measures 9.1 cm x 5.2 cm / Stage: Stage 4
Drainage present - serosanguineous, moderate. No odor noted. Treatment: Foam dressing change daily.
